subject: Fw:Sultan Ahmed Bin Sulayem <> Carbyne (Through Ehud Barak)
body:
This a startup it has a good future steady consistent revenue stream in an important business for airports and public facilities I am intending to invest what do you think

Sent from my Huawei Mobile

-------- Original Message --------
Subject: Sultan Ahmed Bin Sulayem <> Carbyne (Through Ehud Barak)
From: Amir Elichai
To: Sultan Bin Sulayem
CC: Ehud Barak

Dear Sultan,

It was a great pleasure meeting you today.

We discussed 3 topics:

1. Carbyne for personal security in the Sea-ports
2. Carbyne in General (For Dubai 911 or the Emirates)
3. Carbyne series B round

As for the discussed topics:

1. We will check what are the opportunities to improve Seaport personals security. Most likely it will be based on the c-Now app with Alert zones. If you can please put me in touch with the relevant people it will be helpful to design/offer a solution.

2. We would love to work with you / people you may know for implementing Carbyne technologies for the national public safety authorities within the UAE.

3. Carbyne is at the final stage for completing the B round. We raised 13.9m US $ from top-tier investors include https://Foundersfund.com/portfolio/ - Currently there is 1.1m US $ left - if you would like to get more info please let me know.

General Info:

As discussed,  Carbyne<https://app-frankfurt.salesforceiq.com/r?target=5b66ab094cedfd007a690957&t=ABb3-Ad3_us42k6e_Xul-7oBWpGX_0ILu1sAIWup4XrOOGBzc0CWRG_FGSzuGCbcMnjbbgY-YcXHlEfbBkkRkgJNQtnXaLDuITnNMN9zR9aR6KRHN7NAawiDAuv_QQQfapktEgfzkJ24&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.carbyne911.com%2F>, developed an Eco-system that disrupted the way we all thinking about Real-time emergency communication. Supported by worldwide leaders, Investors, and partners. Carbyne presented a Global IP grid that enables any GOV/Cities to engage with their people via Rich Data package with a Carrier-grade SLA (No app is needed - Plug and Play) - Worldwide.

Please see attached:

1. Presentation
2. Executive Brief

Sample projects:

1. Project In Nice<https://app-frankfurt.salesforceiq.com/r?target=5b31fa64c9e77c0077e88bbd&t=ABb3-AfTsl-H2w59A3T8eQLP7B9r4FknhfavQalbaE0rINFj_3z0l63X6taanhfLbE16TVRHIIASbm1t1JCnieoA6aSzMFHeJiNNHcSz70kRZvQ9s2yPW-mwaxxj5sD7fcdj97ZBuHTW> (France)
2. Project In U.S<http://www.fox5atlanta.com/news/fayette-county-to-get-new-video-911-system>
3. Project In the Israeli National EMS<https://app-frankfurt.salesforceiq.com/r?target=5b31fa64c9e77c0077e88bc1&t=ABb3-AfTsl-H2w59A3T8eQLP7B9r4FknhfavQalbaE0rINFj_3z0l63X6taanhfLbE16TVRHIIASbm1t1JCnieoA6aSzMFHeJiNNHcSz70kRZvQ9s2yPW-mwaxxj5sD7fcdj97ZBuHTW>
4. Additional Case Studies (Mexico etc)<https://app-frankfurt.salesforceiq.com/r?target=5b31fa64c9e77c0079566915&t=ABb3-AfTsl-H2w59A3T8eQLP7B9r4FknhfavQalbaE0rINFj_3z0l63X6taanhfLbE16TVRHIIASbm1t1JCnieoA6aSzMFHeJiNNHcSz70kRZvQ9s2yPW-mwaxxj5sD7fcdj97ZBuHTW>

In addition please see:

1. Carbyne General Video<https://app-frankfurt.salesforceiq.com/r?target=5b31fa64c9e77c007a2f79e4&t=ABb3-AfTsl-H2w59A3T8eQLP7B9r4FknhfavQalbaE0rINFj_3z0l63X6taanhfLbE16TVRHIIASbm1t1JCnieoA6aSzMFHeJiNNHcSz70kRZvQ9s2yPW-mwaxxj5sD7fcdj97ZBuHTW>
2. www.carbyne911.com<https://app-frankfurt.salesforceiq.com/r?target=5b31fa64c9e77c0077e88bc2&t=ABb3-AfTsl-H2w59A3T8eQLP7B9r4FknhfavQalbaE0rINFj_3z0l63X6taanhfLbE16TVRHIIASbm1t1JCnieoA6aSzMFHeJiNNHcSz70kRZvQ9s2yPW-mwaxxj5sD7fcdj97ZBuHTW>

I'm looking forward to hearing from you at the discussed topics.

Amir.





--

[Photograph]<https://www.carbyne911.com/>

AMIR ELICHAI
Founder & CEO
M: +972-54-678-3796
M (US) : +1-917-856-0997
E:  Amir@carbyne911.com<mailto:Amir@carbyne911.com>
www.carbyne911.com<http://www.carbyne911.com/>
[Facebook icon]<https://www.facebook.com/CarbyneGlobal/> [Twitter icon] <https://twitter.com/carbyne911>  [LinkedIn icon] <https://www.linkedin.com/company/5337585/>  [Youtube icon] <https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_GtWy7-AHkXjc0EFtZuVXw?disable_polymer=true>
Creating a Better Now.
